summary: CP currently at 0.12, needs to be strictly above 0.25 on Feb 28. CP has been in 0.10-0.16 range most of the last week. Very unlikely to cross threshold.
content: Post 42176 meta-prediction about post 40281. Current CP: 0.12 (from API) and 0.12 (from CP history latest). Threshold: strictly above 0.25. CP has only been above 0.25 twice in 143 data points (both in first hours). Touched 0.25 exactly 5 times briefly on Feb 16-17 but quickly reverted. 89 forecasters provide moderate stability. The underlying question about BCI coding tool integration by Nov 2026 is genuinely very unlikely. No known catalyst to push forecasters higher.
